title: Tachometer's EAS
description: A retake on IDOT's EAS Addon for PMWeather
body:
# INFORMATION
This mod is meant to be used with ProtoManly's weather mod, or else it will not work.

This fork aims to add more data based gameplay along with MANY QoL changes. For a general guide on the base functions of this mod, refer to the source. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/eas-addon
